name: review_pack_writer
description: Assemble periodic review packs from synthesized evidence, goal status, and capability assessments into a structured review document.
intent: Generate a complete review pack document for approval

inputs.name: scope_id
inputs.description: Odoo record ID for the scope entity

outputs.name: evidence_appendix
outputs.description: Evidence documents attached to the pack

agentInstructions: Collect all goal status syntheses for the review period, assemble into a structured document with sections (summary, goals, key results, evidence, recommendations). Attach evidence appendix. Route to approval_coordinator. Never self-approve.
